message:
So there I was, sipping my morning coffee, when my neighbor popped by to chat. We got onto the topic of preparedness (shocking, I know!) and I casually mentioned how I finally put together my go-bags after a few too many late-night online rabbit holes. You know the ones—where you end up watching videos on emergency kits and realize you’ve been living in blissful ignorance? 😅

Fast forward a week, and guess who was the star of the neighborhood when a surprise thunderstorm rolled in? Yep, yours truly! I felt a bit smug as I handed out my extra flashlights and water bottles to those caught off guard. It was one of those moments that made me realize how little steps can make a big difference.

Preparedness doesn’t have to be overwhelming; it can just be about being ready for life’s little surprises. Have you had any moments where you were glad you were prepared? This little refresher helped me a lot!
